title: Ising Model Simulation
description: Implemented a 2D Ising model simulation using the Metropolis algorithm to study magnetization, spin interactions, and phase transition behavior in statistical physics systems.

title: Droplet Data Analysis
description: Processed and analyzed simulation data related to droplet dynamics, including numerical datasets for fluid behavior, visualization, and computational experiments.

title: Quantum Kernel SVM Project
description: Developed quantum machine learning models using Qiskit and Quantum Support Vector Machines (QSVM). Explored quantum kernels, parameterized quantum circuits, and hybrid quantum-classical classification techniques.

title: Droplet Simulation
description: Built numerical simulations for studying droplet motion and fluid dynamics using computational physics techniques and lattice-based modeling approaches.

title: LBM Project
description: Implemented fluid flow simulations using the Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM), including D2Q9 lattice models, collision-streaming mechanics, and boundary condition handling.
